parameters.query:
SELECT o.id, o.opp_title, o.agency, o.estimated_value, o.gda_score, o.gda_label, o.response_deadline,
  o.response_deadline::date - CURRENT_DATE as days_left,
  CASE WHEN cp.opp_id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END as has_capture_plan
FROM gda_opportunity_tracker o
LEFT JOIN gda_capture_plans cp ON cp.opp_id = o.id
WHERE o.stage NOT IN ('No-Bid','Cancelled','No-Go')
  AND o.gda_label IN ('PURSUE','EVALUATE')
  AND o.response_deadline IS NOT NULL
  AND o.response_deadline::date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + 7
ORDER BY o.response_deadline ASC

INSERT INTO gda_risk_register (risk_key, title, severity, category, opp_id, description, mitigation, status, auto_generated, source, created_at, updated_at)
SELECT
  'deadline_' || o.id::text || '_' || CURRENT_DATE::text,
  'DEADLINE ALERT: ' || o.opp_title,
  CASE WHEN o.response_deadline::date - CURRENT_DATE <= 3 THEN 'CRITICAL'
       WHEN o.response_deadline::date - CURRENT_DATE <= 7 THEN 'HIGH'
       ELSE 'MEDIUM' END,
  'deadline',
  o.id,
  'Opportunity due in ' || (o.response_deadline::date - CURRENT_DATE) || ' days. Score: ' || o.gda_score || '. ' ||
    CASE WHEN NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM gda_capture_plans cp WHERE cp.opp_id = o.id) THEN 'NO CAPTURE PLAN.' ELSE 'Has capture plan.' END,
  'Review and action before deadline',
  'OPEN',
  true,
  'deadline-escalation',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
FROM gda_opportunity_tracker o
WHERE o.id = ANY(ARRAY[{{ $input.all().map(i => i.json.id).join(',') }}]::int[])
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM gda_risk_register r
    WHERE r.opp_id = o.id AND r.category = 'deadline'
    AND r.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  )
ON CONFLICT (risk_key) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id, title
